scalarTokens.label: Selector radius
scalarTokens.doc: Corner radius for round selector controls (Radio, Checkbox, Switch, Toggle).

scalarTokens.label: Field radius
scalarTokens.doc: Corner radius for form fields — Input, Select, Textarea, Button, etc.

scalarTokens.label: Box radius
scalarTokens.doc: Corner radius for box-tier surfaces — Card, Dialog, Popover, Dropdown, and similar containers.

scalarTokens.label: Border width
scalarTokens.doc: Hairline border width shared by fields and box surfaces (Input, Card, etc.).

scalarTokens.label: Field size
scalarTokens.doc: Base unit fields scale their height/padding from — raising it enlarges Input/Select/Button uniformly.

scalarTokens.label: Depth
scalarTokens.doc: Shadow intensity on Card (resting + hover-lift box-shadow) and Button (inset highlight + drop shadow on solid fills). Set to 0 for fully flat surfaces — no per-component shadow-none needed.

scalarTokens.label: Noise
scalarTokens.doc: Reserved for a grain/noise surface texture. Not yet wired into any component's CSS — currently has no visible effect.

scalarTokens.label: Focus ring width
scalarTokens.doc: Outline width of the keyboard focus ring across interactive components.

typography.baseFontSize: 100% (≈16px) — an explicit anchor, not the UA default by accident; the whole rem-based type scale (text-md = 1rem) scales with it.
typography.note: Every non-namespace token (see scalarTokens above, plus --duration, --ease, --focus-offset which aren't yet theme-editable) carries its default inline via var(--token, default) in each component, so an app's own :root/@theme override always wins.
